title: Cashier
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Greet customers and maintains a friendly attitude towards all customers
  • Attend to customers’ queries at the cashier counter
  • Assist customers in the in-store checkout process
  • Handle daily cashiering duties
  • Receive and processes all payments according to standard procedures.
  • Process change to customer in an accurate and concise manner.
  • Coordinate with retail staff for product inquiries and price checks.
  • Implement current promotional events during the checkout process
  • Stay update on corporate partners’ rewards and redemption programme.
  • Completes, processes, and maintains applicable paperwork and records.
  • Count the cash in the drawer at the end of the day ensuring cash equals receipts.
  • Performs daily, weekly and monthly audits of cash intake or cash drawers.

Requirements:

  • Demonstrate ability to work as a team
  • Customer-service oriented
  • Have an eye for detail
  • Maintain a positive attitude and focus on customer satisfaction in a fast-paced environment
  • Able to maintain composure
  • Able to work on Rotational shift

Note:

  • Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
  • The working location will be at Gain City Megastore at Sungei Kaduk.
    A shuttle bus service is available from Yew Tee or Choa Chu Kang.

postedCompany.description:
GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD

Looking for a challenging and rewarding career in a fast paced organization? Join Gain City!


Established in 1981, Gain City is one of Singapore‘s leading retail brand carrying a wide range of quality air-conditioners, home appliances, audio visual equipment, digital and IT products. It is a multi-faceted organisation with distinctive track records in retail and wholesales operations, manufacturing, maintenance and repair, commercial, industrial and residential projects, import and export.
 

Gain City the leading home-grown appliances and electronic retail store is also proud to be the recipient of the prestigious Enterprise 50 Award (5 times), Singapore Prestige Brand Award 2011 (Winner, SPBA-Heritage Brand). Gain City has also previously awarded other celebrated award such as the ISO 9001-2000 Certification, Super Brand (2004,2005,2006,2008 & 2009) and Singapore Promising Brand Award (2006).
postedCompany.name: GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD
